privileged_info_summary: The task creates a LibreOffice Writer document with emergency action cards. The output file is saved to /home/ga/Documents/emergency_cards.docx. The card content comes from /home/ga/Documents/card_content.txt which is generated at runtime by the setup script and contains four cards with headings and descriptions: CODE RED with IMMEDIATE EVACUATION, CODE YELLOW with SHELTER IN PLACE, CODE BLUE with MEDICAL EMERGENCY, and ALL CLEAR with RETURN TO WORK. The metadata contains simplified/abbreviated versions of the descriptive text (EVACUATION instead of IMMEDIATE EVACUATION, SHELTER instead of SHELTER IN PLACE, MEDICAL instead of MEDICAL EMERGENCY, RETURN instead of RETURN TO WORK). All data is synthetically generated during task setup, with no external data sources.
